parameters.name: FILE
parameters.help:
Spooled file (FILE)

Specifies the spooled file which has its records displayed.

This is a required parameter.

parameters.name: JOB
parameters.help:
Job name (JOB)

Specifies the name of the job that created the spooled file whose data records are to be displayed.

Single values

Qualifier 1: Job name

Qualifier 2: User

Qualifier 3: Number

parameters.name: SPLNBR
parameters.help:
Spooled file number (SPLNBR)

Specifies the number of the job's spooled file that is to be displayed.

指定できる特殊値: *ONLY, *LAST, *ANY

parameters.name: JOBSYSNAME
parameters.help:
Job system name (JOBSYSNAME)

Specifies the system where the job that created the spooled file (JOB parameter) ran. This parameter is considered after the job name, user name, job number, spooled file name, and spooled file number parameter requirements have been met.

指定できる特殊値: *ONLY, *CURRENT, *ANY

parameters.name: CRTDATE
parameters.help:
Spooled file created (CRTDATE)

Specifies the date and time the spooled file was created. This parameter is considered after the job name, user name, job number, spooled file name, spooled file number, and job system name parameter requirements have been met.

Single values

Element 1: Creation date

Element 2: Creation time

parameters.name: FOLD
parameters.help:
Fold records (FOLD)

Specifies whether the first display has the records folded (wrapped) if they are longer than the length of the display line.
